Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to occur after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation until the next decision activity (e.g., SW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total elapsed time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation and SW-EIC Minor Revision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-EIC Minor Revision'

Name: Total time spent in SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation compared to time spent in SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed versus variants that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Elapsed time from the last occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to the final editorial decision (SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision, or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to be followed by any EIC decision activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases where multiple reviewers agreed (i.e., multiple SW-Reviewer Agreed events precede it)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs
